final:
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input sreset,
    input enable,
    output reg [9:0] count
);always @(posedge clk)
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

        if (sreset) begin
            count <= 10'b0000000000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
endmodule
